div1.entryFree: Unburthen, to unload, to free from a burden: while we --ed crawl toward death, Lr. I, 1, 42. Figuratively, == to disclose (what lies heavy on the mind): to u. all my plots and purposes, Merch. I, 1, 133. Buckingham --s with his tongue the envious load that lies upon his heart, H6B III, 1, 156.
